archetype_reasoning: This trader exclusively buys NO at 0.992-0.999 prices across near-certain political outcomes — third-party election wins, obscure balance-of-power configurations, and long-shot candidacies. Directionality of 1.0 confirms they never take the other side. All entries are in the 0.992-0.999 range, well past the near-certainty threshold of 0.95, indicating pure premium collection rather than genuine forecasting.
domain_blindspots: All domains: 50% win rate across every domain signals no genuine predictive edge — losses occur when near-certain positions occasionally resolve wrong (e.g. Wyoming Presidential market resolving as a loss at 0.998)
domain_summary: This trader has no identifiable domain edge — all domain accuracies sit at exactly 0.50, which is consistent with a yield-harvesting strategy where wins and losses balance out and edge comes from tiny premium spreads, not forecasting skill. The geo_elo of 2408 is likely an artifact of high trade volume rather than genuine predictive accuracy.
signal_weight_reasoning: All trades are near-certainty NO positions at 0.992-0.999. This trader provides zero signal about genuine probability assessments of contested outcomes. Copying these trades offers no alpha and carries occasional catastrophic loss risk when a near-certain outcome fails. Realized PnL is slightly negative despite operating in near-certainty space, confirming the edge is minimal to nonexistent.
behavioural_flags: Exclusively buys NO at 0.992-0.999 — never trades contested markets
Multiple duplicate trades on the same market (e.g. 6 trades on Wyoming Presidential at identical prices)
Positions sized uniformly small (8-76 shares), suggesting systematic small-lot harvesting
Active across many markets but all with identical structural characteristics
No evidence of exiting positions early or adjusting based on new information
risk_patterns: Near-certainty trades can suffer total loss on tail events — Wyoming at 0.998 resolved as a loss, demonstrating real downside
Duplicate positions on same market inflates exposure concentration without diversification benefit
Realized PnL is negative despite only trading near-certainties, suggesting slippage and loss events erode all premium gains
High geo_elo (2408) likely inflated by volume/near-certainty wins and not reflective of forecasting skill — active ELO (1889) is more representative
Open positions include markets with null resolution dates suggesting potential illiquidity or abandoned markets

notable_calls.significance: Multiple NO positions at 0.997-0.999 all resolved as losses, demonstrating that even near-certainty harvesting carries real loss risk
Additional losses on ostensibly near-certain positions, reinforcing that yield harvesting at these prices does not guarantee profit

notable_calls.market: Biden resigns from presidency by August 31
notable_calls.significance: Stale open position with no resolution date — possible liquidity trap or forgotten position

open_positions_summary: All 15 open positions are NO bets at 0.992-0.998 on obvious outcomes: third-party Senate/Congressional wins, obscure balance-of-power configurations, long-shot 2028 Democratic nominees (Walz, Warnock), and a stale Biden resignation market. The unified thesis is premium collection on near-zero probability events. Aggregate exposure is modest but concentrated in the same structural bet.
watch_items: Monitor whether any open third-party Senate/House positions resolve as unexpected losses, which would further depress already-negative PnL
Check if Biden resignation and other null-resolution-date positions ever resolve — they may be permanently open illiquid markets
Track whether geo_elo continues to decay via geo_elo_active — if active ELO drops below 1800, reclassify tier downward
Watch for any deviation from 1.0 directionality — any YES trade would signal a meaningful behavioural shift worth investigating
summary: This trader is a textbook yield harvester with zero genuine forecasting signal — every single trade is a NO position at 0.992-0.999 on near-certain outcomes. The high raw geo_elo (2408) is misleading and purely volume-driven; the recency-decayed active ELO (1889) is more honest and sits well below LEGENDARY threshold. Realized PnL is actually slightly negative despite trading only near-certainties, confirming the strategy generates no net alpha. This address should be excluded from all signal generation pipelines as it provides no information about contested probability assessments.
